rulings.Case Title: CARROLL CONNOR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, March 8, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. The hearing on Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation¿s motion for summary adjudication is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 8, 2010, but anyone wishing to contest the tentative ruling must do so by 4:30 p.m. March 3, 2010. Metalclad¿s motion for summary judgment has been withdrawn. The only aspect of Metalclad¿s alternate motion for summary adjudication that remains is issue 6 seeking summary adjudication on the claim for punitive damages, which is granted. Metalclad satisfied its burden of production by presenting plaintiffs¿ factually devoid responses to contention interrogatories. Plaintiffs have not raised a triable issue by the required standard of clear and convincing evidence. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROGER RUSICH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Juanita Rusich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, March 8, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to appoint Juanita Rusich as Successor-in-Interest for deceased plaintiff and for leave to filed first amended complaint is denied. The required declaration is not signed by Juainto Rusich. Leave is given to re-file the motion with a compliant declaration. =(220/HEK)
